description.content: General SIM Management
Get a List of SIMs for the current account.

query.description: Number index of the requested SIM list page. Use this parameter to iterate through all SIMs on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response header.
Defines the size of a page, the number of individual SIMs listed on one page. The maximum allowed value is 100.

Filter parameter in {filter}:{value} format. Expects comma separated list of filtering criteria out of the following fields:
  • imei
  • ip_address

Example: "ip_address:127.0.0.1,imei:4711"

Sort values in a comma seperated list. Prepend "-" for descending sort. Possible values:
  • imei
  • ip_address

Example:"ip_address,-imei"

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
SMS Management
Get a list of SMS sent and received by a specific SIM card.

query.description: Number index of the requested SIM SMS page. Use this parameter to iterate through all SIMs on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response header.
The number of SMS messages per page, maximum allowed value is 100.
Keys by which the SMS messages should be sorted, listed as comma sperated values.

variable.description: (Required) The ICCID of the SIM to be queried.

response.name: OK

Retrieve connectivity information and cell tower of a device with a given SIM. The API call returns valid information when the 1NCE SIM is attached to a 2G/3G network only.

Event Management
Get diagnostic/event information for a SIM card.

query.description: Number index of the requested SIM event page. Use this parameter to iterate through all SIMs on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response header.
The number of events per page, maximum allowed value is 1000.
Sort values based on keys that are listed as a comma seperated list, prepend "-" for descending order.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
SIM Extension Management

Trigger the SIM extension for one or more SIM cards to extend their activation period and renew their quota (data and SMS). An invoice is automatically triggered depending on the chosen payment method.

query.description: Optional payment method selection between creditcard, banktransfer, monthly invoice or boleto. If the parameter is left empty or is invalid, banktransfer is used as default for the SIM extension process. To use creditcard please save your credit card details in the customer portal via "account".
